# @opensip-tools/targeting

> Host file-targeting runtime substrate for OpenSIP Tools — the generic TargetRegistry, uniform glob expansion (resolveTargets/preResolveAllTargets), and globalExcludes filtering any tool consumes via scope.targets

This is an **internal library** of the opensip-tools toolkit. It is published so the CLI and tools can depend on it; most users will not install it directly.

Part of [**opensip-tools**](https://github.com/opensip-ai/opensip-tools) — an open-source codebase-analysis toolkit: fitness checks (`fit`), static call-graph analysis (`graph`), and simulation (`sim`).

## Install

Most users install the CLI, which bundles the first-party tools:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://opensip.ai/cli/install.sh | bash
```

This package is published for the CLI and advanced plugin authors; most users should not install `@opensip-tools/targeting` directly.
